texto: You should look straight at a film
autor: that's the only way to see one. Film is not the art of scholars but of illiterates.
explicacao: Orientação direta de that's the only way to see one. Film is not the art of scholars but of illiterates. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “You should look straight at a film” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, werner-herzog, should, útil em momentos de reflexao.
